headline: Top takeaways from Trump's address on Iran war, Strait of Hormuz
summary: President Trump declared that the Iran war may be far from over as the US leader vowed to bomb the country "back to the Stone Age" in his national address on Wednesday.US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) have slowed their rally in Thursday's session, while oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F) have surged.Yahoo Finance Washington Correspondent Ben Werschkul reacts to Trump's latest stance on the escalating conflicts in the Middle East, reopening the Strait of Hormuz, and how global energy markets are subsequently responding.

raw.headline: Top takeaways from Trump's address on Iran war, Strait of Hormuz
raw.summary: President Trump declared that the Iran war may be far from over as the US leader vowed to bomb the country "back to the Stone Age" in his national address on Wednesday.US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) have slowed their rally in Thursday's session, while oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F) have surged.Yahoo Finance Washington Correspondent Ben Werschkul reacts to Trump's latest stance on the escalating conflicts in the Middle East, reopening the Strait of Hormuz, and how global energy markets are subsequently responding.

headline: Blue Owl Limits Redemptions on Private Credit Funds After Massive Exit Requests
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Blue Owl Capital Inc. will limit redemptions from two of its private credit funds after facing a surge in withdrawal requests that is unprecedented among major firms in the $1.8 trillion market.Investors in its $36 billion Blue Owl Credit Income Corp. fund, one of the industry’s largest, asked to pull 21.9% of shares in the three months ended March 31, according to an investor letter, up from 5.2% in the prior period. headline: A Look At BlackRock (BLK) Valuation As Regulatory Scrutiny And Governance Questions Intensify
